data.name: Jiggle Journey
data.detailed_description:
Once upon a time, in a land far far away, there lived a witch. Several of them in fact! (Such being the nature of the far-far-aways.) But this one witch has a very special power. Whenever she gets laid her boobs grow! Best power ever, right? Unfortunately, this very special witch is also a very lazy witch, who would rather spend all day laying in her hammock than laying… well… ahem!

But that’s where you come in! She’s been sent on a journey and it’s up to you to make sure it’s the Jiggliest journey that’s ever been had! Will you help her make it? Will you help her grow? Will you leave her collapsed and pinned under her own mountainous melons? It’s all up to you in Jiggle Journey!

Journey through four different lands, each with their own set of events and conquests. Meet fascinating supernatural being and Submit or Dominate them to grow your bosom. But be careful! As your breasts' weight increases they will sap your energy. You’ll need to find mana orbs to offset the loss or your jiggling days will be over!

Features and Content:

Jiggle Journey is a fantasy, Adult adventure with a focus on the breast-expansion fetish. Choices are made in how you manage your resources (gold and energy), which challenges to take (using your primary statistics Martial, Mystic, Charm and Trickery) and when to submit. Gameplay is choice-based and low stress (no quick time events or game overs) with a fun story and lots of erotic content. It includes forty different unique enemies (each with their own Domination and Submission scenes) all of which are available for the 26 different breast sizes that can be reached by the main character.

data.short_description: It’s jiggling time! Journey through fantasy lands as a witch with the power to turn sexual energy into breast expansion. Exceed the bounds of nature and common sense while being sure to spread the love!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 20.04 (64-bit) or equivalent
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
